title: taraxacum subecorniculatum
intro: Taraxacum subecorniculatum, also known as the yellow dandelion or false dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum subecorniculatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
